channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 vs Fold 8 Ultra: Which new foldable is better for you?
item.description: Let's compare the differences between Samsung's latest large foldables.

item.title: Were younger workers right all along? New study claims Gen Z workers say they are far more productive at home
item.description: If Gen Z workers are to be believed, it seems that the modern workplace is actually unsuitable for productivity.

item.title: Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy explains why Anthropic is winning (and it’s not the model)
item.description: Anthropic leaped to a $47 billion revenue run rate by May, compared to $9 billion in 2025. It’s the kind of growth that Menlo Ventures’ Matt Murphy says he’s never seen in 25 years of investing, not in the internet wave, not in mobile, not in the first cloud boom. Menlo led Anthropic’s $500M Series D, and Murphy has had a front-row seat as the company went from a pre-revenue, […]...

item.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie 4K Blu-ray might not be my favorite movie of the year, but my god it's an awesome new reference disc for testing TVs and Dolby Atmos sound system
item.description: Another month, another reference-quality 4K Blu-ray: and this time, it's The Super Mario Galaxy Movie.

item.title: Arozzi Vernazza Supersoft review: 'The most comfortable office chair I've worked in'
item.description: See beyond its standard looks and you'll find the Arozzi Vernazza Supersoft is a supremely comfortable, sturdy, and durable gaming and office chair.

item.title: Monday.com lays off hundreds to focus on AI
item.description: The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or about 630 staff, to "support a leaner, more focused operating model" as it focuses on its AI Work Platform.

item.title: Dyson V10 Konical Review (2026): Affordable and Solid
item.description: Out of Dyson’s two new affordable stick vacuums, this one is easily my favorite.

item.title: Le Galaxy Z Fold 8 de Samsung nous montre-t-il déjà l’écran de l’iPhone Ultra ?
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 ressemble au futur iPhone Ultra d'Apple, mais il embarque peut-être aussi le même écran.

item.title: We tested Creality's 3D printers — and these 4 Amazon deals are actually worth buying
item.description: From $187 entry-level models to multi-color flagships, our workshop testing breaks down the best Ender and K-series discounts for every budget.

item.title: Coup dur pour Tesla : la France interdit la conduite autonome et brise le rêve de milliers de conducteurs
item.description: Alors que la conduite autonome de Tesla est progressivement déployée en Europe, la France a choisi son camp : ce sera sans le FSD. Le Ministre des Transports évoque officiellement un niveau de sécurité encore insuffisant.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked: Live updates from the foldable launch event
item.description: Samsung is hosting a Galaxy Unpacked event in London on July 22. Mashable will be there reporting live on all of the latest news and product launches.

item.title: The Daily Show is making a White House microdrama for your phone
item.description: The Daily Show joins Hollywood’s microdrama boom as entertainment companies invest in vertical series.

item.title: Poinpy, a perfect video game, is back and it's completely free on mobile
item.description: Poinpy disappeared from Netflix games last year but is now free for Android and iPhone.

item.title: Samsung just revealed more details about its upcoming smart glasses, including battery life
item.description: Samsung's upcoming smart glasses will last nine hours per charge, but they come with a case for more juice.

item.title: Lunettes Samsung : « on a injecté de la crème solaire dans les haut-parleurs » pour les tester
item.description: Samsung promet que ses lunettes connectées sont à la fois légères et très résistantes. La marque a même utilisé de la crème solaire pour s'en assurer. Oui, vous avez bien lu.

item.title: Elon Musk claims Grok will make historically accurate AI Odyssey adaptation this year
item.description: The X and Grok owner has been a vocal critic of Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey." Now, he's promising a rival adaptation using generative AI... as Homer intended?

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Glasses shown at Unpacked. See the smart glasses now.
item.description: At a July 22 Samsung Galaxy Unpacked event in London, the Korean tech company provided a closer look at its upcoming Galaxy Glasses on the Android XR platform.

item.title: Google is making it easier to switch from iPhone to Android
item.description: The new feature lets users wirelessly transfer more data types from an iPhone without needing to download a separate app.

item.title: A bizarre new malware campaign hacks your printer and forces it to print out ransomware demands
item.description: Researchers detail two incidents in Latin America in which system misconfigurations resulted in ransomware attacks.

item.title: Somehow, the new Samsung Z Fold8 is $100 cheaper than the Fold7, and the Flip8 is only $100 more than the Flip7
item.description: The new Samsung Galaxy Flip and Fold 8 start at $1,199.99 while the previous Samsung Galaxy Flip and Fold 7 start at $1,099.99.

item.title: La Maison-Blanche accuse la nouvelle IA chinoise de pointe d’avoir pillé Anthropic
item.description: Le conseiller scientifique et technologique de Donald Trump, Michael Kratsios, a accusé mercredi la jeune entreprise chinoise Moonshot AI d’avoir pillé le modèle d’intelligence artificielle (IA) le plus avancé d’Anthropic pour mettre au point sa propre IA, Kimi K3, qui fait sensation depuis sa sortie.

item.title: Xbox's surprise announcement of PC backwards compatibility is great to see — and one more reason not to buy a console
item.description: Xbox is bringing some classic games to PC with its new backward compatibility program.

item.title: The new De'Longhi Magnifica Duo prepares 20 different coffee drinks at the tap of a button — and its 3-minute cold brew feature has me sold
item.description: De'Longhi has upgraded one of its best automatic coffee makers with the ability to prepare authentic cold-extracted espresso, complete with chilled milk foam.

item.title: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
item.description: Following the MacBook Neo's huge popularity so far, Apple is reportedly developing an updated version of its budget laptop with a new processor and more memory, and even has plans to refresh the model with new colors. Following a similar report from analyst Tim Culpan earlier this year, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman says the new Neo […]

item.title: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like
item.description: Samsung has given us our first chance to check out its upcoming smart glasses in person, revealing two new designs and the first specs in the process, including an impressive 9-hour battery life. The glasses, developed in collaboration with Google and the eyewear brands Gentle Monster and Warby Parker, are due to launch this fall. […]

item.title: Xbox is bringing games from its original console to PC
item.description: Some original Xbox games are coming to PC, complete with achievement support.

item.title: J’ai essayé le DS N°7, un SUV électrique aux 740 km d’autonomie crucial pour l’avenir de la marque
item.description: DS Automobiles renouvelle l'un de ses best-sellers : le DS N°7 remplace le DS 7 et s'offre plusieurs motorisations électriques. J'ai pu prendre le volant de la version offrant le plus d'autonomie, avec 740 km en une charge. Un SUV électrique surprenant sous divers aspects.

item.title: À -50 %, ce mini-vidéoprojecteur Full HD avec batterie intégrée devient le super deal de l’été
item.description: Le Thomson Vega PG35B est un vidéoprojecteur portable Full HD proposé avec Google TV, une batterie intégrée et un étui de transport. Il est en ce moment proposé à 291,94 euros au lieu de 599 euros à son lancement, soit plus de 50 % de remise.

item.title: I still want Samsung's discontinued Galaxy Z TriFold
item.description: Hopefully the Z Fold 8's new design is a sign of things to come.

item.title: AMD investit à hauteur de 5 milliards de dollars dans Anthropic en échange d’une commande massive de puces IA
item.description: AMD se lance à corps perdu dans l'investissement dans l'IA. Un accord à 5 milliards de dollars (environ 4,6 milliards d'euros) conclu avec Anthropic permet au fondeur de fournir de nouvelles puces IA à l'entreprise.

item.title: Taye Diggs challenges studio norms with creator-focused venture Microhouse Films
item.description: Taye Diggs is challenging studio norms with his new creator-focused venture, Microhouse Films.

item.title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
item.description: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.

item.title: Substack’s new tool tells you who’s been writing their newsletters with AI
item.description: Substack is giving readers a way to estimate how much of a newsletter was written by AI, signaling a broader shift toward transparency around AI-assisted content.

item.title: Go rollin on the river with 15% off this LEGO Ideas River Steamboat set
item.description: As of July 22, get 15% off the LEGO Ideas River Steamboat building set at Amazon.

item.title: The Tonies Bluey collection is now available at Target and the Tonies website
item.description: If you missed the pre-order window, the exclusive Tonies Bluey collection is officially available for purchase at Target and the Tonies website.

item.title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
item.description: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.
